sec_protocol_metadata_copy_server_name(_:) Functionsec_protocol_metadata_copy_server_name(_:)iOS 18.5+iPadOS 18.5+Mac Catalyst 18.5+macOS 15.5+tvOS 18.5+visionOS 2.5+watchOS 11.5+func sec_protocol_metadata_copy_server_name(_ metadata: sec_protocol_metadata_t) -> UnsafePointer<CChar>? Parameters metadataA sec_protocol_metadata_t instance.

Returns A NULL-terminated string carrying the server name, or NULL if none was provided.

Obtain a copy of the server name offered by a client or server during connection establishmet. This is the value commonly carried in the TLS SNI extesion. The caller is expected to free the output string when it is no longer needed.

# sec_protocol_metadata_copy_server_name(_:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Security ](/documentation/security)

- [ sec_protocol_metadata_copy_server_name(_:) ](/documentation/Security/sec_protocol_metadata_copy_server_name(_:))

-  sec_protocol_metadata_copy_server_name(_:) 

Function# sec_protocol_metadata_copy_server_name(_:)

iOS 18.5+iPadOS 18.5+Mac Catalyst 18.5+macOS 15.5+tvOS 18.5+visionOS 2.5+watchOS 11.5+

```
func sec_protocol_metadata_copy_server_name(_ metadata: sec_protocol_metadata_t) -> UnsafePointer<CChar>?
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/Security/sec_protocol_metadata_copy_server_name(_:)#parameters)

`metadata`A `sec_protocol_metadata_t` instance.

## [Return Value](/documentation/Security/sec_protocol_metadata_copy_server_name(_:)#return-value)

Returns A NULL-terminated string carrying the server name, or NULL if none was provided.

## [Discussion](/documentation/Security/sec_protocol_metadata_copy_server_name(_:)#discussion)

Obtain a copy of the server name offered by a client or server during connection establishmet. This is the value commonly carried in the TLS SNI extesion. The caller is expected to `free` the output string when it is no longer needed.
